repository_overview: A small Go CLI that reviews GitHub pull requests with Claude Code.

proposals.title: Add JSON schema contract tests
proposals.description: Validate the renderer's JSON output against a declared schema.
proposals.motivation: Catch silent regressions as the output structs evolve.
acceptance_criteria: Schema files exist for ReviewResult and Proposal.
Every fixture validates against the schema.

proposals.title: Document the JSON output contract
proposals.description: Explain the --format json schema for downstream consumers.
proposals.motivation: Downstream tools need a stable contract to parse.
